LAW AND MOTION 302, INTERVENOR WELLS FARGO NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES BY NORTH AMERICAN TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY IS GRANTED. THE DOCUMENTS MAY NOT BE USED FOR ANY PURPOSE OTHER THAN THIS CASE AND MAY NOT BE PROVIDED TO ANYBODY OTHER THAN FOR PURPOSES OF THIS CASE. AS SOON AS THIS CASE IS OVER, THE MATERIALS MUST BE THROWN AWAY AND IF THEY ARE TO BE LODGED WITH ANY PRETRIAL PROCEEDING, THEY HAVE TO BE PART OF A MOTION UNDER SEAL. THE COURT REQUIRES THAT UNREDACTED PAGES BE PROVIDED TO WELLS FARGO WITHIN TWO DAYS. WELLS FARGO IS TO HOLD THOSE DOCUMENTS, SUBJECT TO THE TERMS OF THE PROTECTIVE ORDER. IF THEY DO USE THOSE REDACTED PORTIONS FOR ANY FILING WITH THIS COURT, THEY HAVE TO BE THROUGH THE MOTION FOR SEALED PROCEDURE. IF WELLS FARGO BELIEVES THAT THERE IS A NEED FOR ADDITIONAL DOCUMENTS FROM NORTH AMERICAN TITLE, WELLS FARGO'S COUNSEL WILL NEED TO CONTACT MR. ALVAREZ AND THE PARTIES WILL NEED TO MEET AND CONFER. IF THEY CANNOT RESOLVE IT, WITHOUT NEED FOR AN ADDITIONAL MOTION THE PARTIES CAN COME BACK ON THE EX PARTE CALENDAR ANY DAY THAT WORKS FOR BOTH PARTIES PROVIDED THEY ARE ABLE TO DETERMINE FROM THE COURT CLERK THAT JUDGE KAHN IS IN. MR. ALVAREZ WILL PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: KELLEY DE YOUNG, CSR #6780. (302/HK)
